message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame prod + sem (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame statistical
aggregations:

- prod_basic: column-wise product (1*2*3*4=24, 5*5*5*5=625)
- sem_basic: standard error of the mean per column

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.prod()/.sem() and emits expected_series), runs the Rust
DataFrame.prod_agg()/.sem_agg(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. DataFrameProd / DataFrameSem were already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-9cawb]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
